CVE-2022-4285.title: An illegal memory access flaw was found in the binutils package.  ...
CVE-2022-4285.description: An illegal memory access flaw was found in the binutils package. Parsing an ELF file containing corrupt symbol version information may result in a denial of service. This issue is the result of an incomplete fix for CVE-2020-16599.
